Trigger Type: When a new response is submitted (Forms)
Description: Processes expense claims from Microsoft Forms — validates receipts via AI Builder OCR then routes approval to manager based on cost center lookup. Posts to Teams on completion.
Receives GitHub PR webhooks and posts formatted notifications to team Slack channels. Filters by label and assigns reviewers based on CODEOWNERS file parsing.

Watches a Google Sheet for new invoice entries. Generates PDF from template using Documint and emails to client. Logs to Xero via API.
Pings 12 production endpoints every 5 minutes. If response time > 2s or status != 200 sends PagerDuty alert and logs to InfluxDB for dashboarding.

Exports all Notion workspace pages via API and uploads JSON backup to S3 bucket with 90-day lifecycle policy. Sends weekly digest of backup sizes.
Generates purchase orders from approved requisitions. Pulls supplier data from Dynamics 365 and creates PDF via Office Scripts. Currently fixing currency formatting edge cases.
